    Enum CadIntegralParameterType

    The Cad integral parameter type.

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Cad.CadConsts
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    [ComVisible(false)]
public enum CadIntegralParameterType

    Binary

    The binary parameter

    Boolean

    The boolean parameter.

    Double

    The double parameter.

    Integer

    The integer parameter.

    Long

    The long parameter

    Short

    The short parameter.

    String

    The string parameter.

    Unknown

    The unknown parameter.
